settings.title: About us
settings.text:
‎ ‎

‎

Sideshow Productions: Your trusted tattoo shop founded in 2020

Tattoo shop located in Murray, Utah offering tattoos, piercings, teeth whitening, tooth gems and other services.

We have given to numerous nonprofit organizations, including:
Breast Cancer Research Foundation, Brighton Recovery,
Fit To Recover, Humane Society of Utah, and Toys for Tots.

We offer a clean, sterile, friendly environment for our clients and artists.

Great vibes. Come check us out!

‎

Our Journey:

  • Customer Trust: Our commitment to honesty and quality service has earned us a spot in everyone's hearts (and skin lol)
  • High Ratings: With over 213 reviews and an impressive 4.6 star average rating, our reputation speaks for itself.
  • Community Engagement: Our active participation and donations to various nonprofit organizations reflect our dedication to the community's well-being and our belief in giving back.

‎ ‎

Our Promises:

  • Expertise and Quality: Every artist at Sideshow Productions is selected for their exceptional skill and dedication to craft, using only the highest quality materials to ensure your art is not just safe but lasts a lifetime.
  • Privacy and Confidentiality: We guarantee the utmost discretion with your designs and personal information, offering secure data handling and the option for private sessions to meet your comfort level.
  • Healthy and Safe Environment: Our commitment to your well-being is reflected in our rigorous sterilization protocols, continuous staff training on health and safety, and a client-first approach that ensures a clean, welcoming space for all.

custom_css: .box {background: linear-gradient( to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 20%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 90%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 100% );}

settings.text: We ship our products all across the U.S., ensuring that no matter where you are, our top-quality rims and tires can reach you.
If you're not 100% satisfied with your purchase, our hassle-free return process ensures a smooth experience, giving you peace of mind with every order.
Every rim and tire undergoes rigorous quality checks before it's shipped out, guaranteeing you receive only the best.

custom_css: .gradient-overlay {background: linear-gradient( to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 20%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 100% );}

settings.code:
<script>
(function() {
  var checkAndHideElfsightLink = function() {
    var links = document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="elfsight.com/instagram-feed-instashow"]');
    links.forEach(function(link) {
      link.style.display = 'none';
    });
    
    if (links.length > 0) {
      clearInterval(elfsightLinkInterval);
    }
  };

  var elfsightLinkInterval = setInterval(checkAndHideElfsightLink, 500);

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', checkAndHideElfsightLink);
})();
</script>
